hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$f" in */db/sqlc/*|*/docs/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"生成碼禁止手改：db/sqlc 請改 db/query/*.sql 後執行 make sqlc；docs 請改 handler 註解後執行 make swagger"}}';; esac
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.go) gofmt -w "$f";; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
